name: devcontainer-features
title: DevContainer Features
description: Search and browse devcontainer features from the official registry
author: keito4

commands.name: search-features
commands.title: Search Features
commands.description: Search devcontainer features by name or description

preferences.name: githubToken
preferences.title: GitHub Personal Access Token
preferences.description: Optional: Increases API rate limit from 60 to 5000 requests/hour. Create at github.com/settings/tokens

preferences.name: cacheTtlHours
preferences.title: Cache Duration
preferences.description: How long to cache feature data

preferences.name: concurrency
preferences.title: Fetch Concurrency
preferences.description: Number of parallel API requests when fetching collections
